summary: Completed backend testing for Stripe payment integration. Tested 10 endpoints covering public config, checkout session creation, webhook processing, admin payment management (list/stats/detail/sync/refund), and event logging. 9/10 tests passed (90% success rate). One critical route ordering bug found in /recent-events endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: Route ordering bug - /recent-events route defined AFTER /{payment_id} route (line 12682 after line 12584). FastAPI matches 'recent-events' as a payment_id parameter, causing 404 'Payment not found' error.
critical_bugs.impact: Master admin cannot view recent webhook events log
critical_bugs.fix_required: Move line 12682 (GET /api/admin/payments/recent-events) BEFORE line 12584 (GET /api/admin/payments/{payment_id}) in server.py

passed_tests: GET /api/stripe/public-config - Returns enabled=true, displayMethods with card/apple_pay/google_pay/link, automaticPaymentMethods=true, currency=usd, publishableKey present
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session - Creates session with amount=100, returns sessionId and url, persists to db.payment_sessions
POST /api/stripe/webhook - Accepts payment_intent.succeeded event, returns {received:true, type:...}, persists to db.payments and db.stripe_events
GET /api/admin/payments?days=30 - Returns total + items array (found 6 payments)
GET /api/admin/payments/stats?days=30 - Returns totalAmount, succeeded, failed, pending, refunded, byMethod, byCurrency, daily aggregations
GET /api/admin/payments/{paymentIntentId} - Returns payment + stripe (live API) for real payment ID
POST /api/admin/payments/sync - Pulls recent PaymentIntents from Stripe, returns {success, synced, total}
POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/refund - Route correctly validates payment existence (returns 404 for non-existent payment)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix route ordering bug: Move GET /api/admin/payments/recent-events route definition (line 12682) BEFORE GET /api/admin/payments/{payment_id} route (line 12584) in server.py. This will allow the /recent-events endpoint to work correctly instead of being matched as a payment_id parameter.
